    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Email] = @__email_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

) AS [t0]

    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]

        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

FROM [Users] AS [u]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
    FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
    WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]

        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[ModifiedBy], [u].[ModifiedOn], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t2].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedBy], [p].[ModifiedOn], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[ModifiedBy], [u].[ModifiedOn], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t2].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedBy], [p].[ModifiedOn], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[ModifiedBy], [u].[ModifiedOn], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t2].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedBy], [p].[ModifiedOn], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[ModifiedBy], [u].[ModifiedOn], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AccountHolderName], [t].[AccountNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[BankName], [t].[BranchName], [t].[CompanyName], [t].[ContactPerson], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t].[Email] AS [Email0], [t].[GSTNumber], [t].[IFSCCode], [t].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentTerms], [t].[Phone], [t].[PreferredCurrency], [t].[SwiftCode], [t].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0], [t].[VendorName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]
        FROM [Vendors] AS [v]
        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t2].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedBy], [p].[ModifiedOn], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t2] ON [r].[Id] = [t2].[RoleId]
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t1].[UserId], [t1].[RoleId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId]

    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedBy], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[ModifiedBy], [v].[ModifiedOn], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

        WHERE [v].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [u].[VendorId] = [t].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[ModifiedBy], [r].[ModifiedOn], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t2].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t2].[PermissionId], [t2].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t2].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t2].[Id] AS [Id0], [t2].[Code], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t2].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t2].[Description] AS [Description0], [t2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t2].[ModifiedBy] AS [ModifiedBy0], [t2].[ModifiedOn] AS [ModifiedOn0], [t2].[Module], [t2].[Name] AS [Name0], [t2].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

To identify the query that's triggering this warning call 'ConfigureWarnings(w => w.Throw(RelationalEventId.MultipleCollectionIncludeWarning))'.
